evidence.source_title: Former Iranian Minister Arrested For Financial Fraud
evidence.description: RFE/RL reports that Parviz Kazemi, former minister, became chairman of Sarmayeh Bank and was arrested in 2018 on financial fraud charges related to his conduct there.
Wikipedia confirms Kazemi became chairman of Sarmayeh Bank after leaving government, and was arrested November 2018 for fraud including 46 illegal loans.

editorial_notes: Kazemi chaired Sarmayeh Bank after his 2006 resignation as minister. Arrested November 2018, sentenced to 20 years in 2022.
